title: Beam Global Secures Repeat Orders from Dallas Municipality
text: City of Dallas ordered additional Beam Global EV ARC systems as part of its electrification strategy. Dallas represents a key municipal customer deploying Beam's off-grid EV charging technology to support its expanding electric vehicle fleet including electric pickup trucks. Purchase was made via U.S. GSA Multiple Award Schedule contract following Beam's recently renewed GSA contract and new Sourcewell contract. These procurement vehicles simplify public-sector purchasing and expand addressable market for Beam Global's EV charging solutions. City of Dallas targets all new light-duty vehicles and transit buses to be electric by 2030 and full fleet by 2040 as part of carbon neutrality goal by 2050. Repeat purchases from major municipalities like Dallas demonstrate strong product-market fit and increasing demand for off-grid EV charging solutions in the U.S. public sector.
